textPlain: This is a really well written article and contains references to back up the claims made.  This part was mind blowing though:> Cursor sends 100% of their revenue to Anthropic, who then takes that money and puts it into building out Claude Code, a competitor to Cursor. Cursor is Anthropic's largest customer. Cursor is deeply unprofitable, and was that way even before Anthropic chose to add "Service Tiers," jacking up the prices for enterprise apps like Cursor.
